# desec_domain (List Resource)

Lists deSEC DNS zones (domains).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all domains for the account
list "desec_domain" "all" {
  provider = desec
}

# List domains that own a specific fully-qualified domain name
list "desec_domain" "owns" {
  provider = desec
  config {
    owns_qname = "sub.example.com."
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `owns_qname` (String) Filter domains by whether they own the given fully-qualified domain name.
